query:
SELECT u.id as userId, u.name, u.email, u.role, 
       pp.id as photoId, pp.subcategory, pp.uploadedBy, pp.projectId
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN projectPhotos pp ON pp.uploadedBy = u.id
WHERE u.role = 'operario';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT u.id as userId, u.name, u.email, u.role,
